# Fixtures

`word_style_footnotes.docx` is a committed OOXML corpus fixture with a full
Word-style package layout: content types, package relationships, document
relationships, styles, visible footnote references, footnote hyperlink
relationships, separator notes, and an existing tracked insertion in
`word/document.xml`.

It is intentionally small and non-confidential. The fixture exercises package
parts that minimal synthetic ZIP snippets do not cover.
